ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-22-2023 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Appearance by William Edward Weiss, Esq. for Defendant. Plaintiff's Counsel Roger S. Kubein, Esq. is sanctioned $250.00 for failure to appear. The case is ordered dismissed. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; Clerk: JLee; Proceedings not reported. ***Note: Defense counsel appeared and left after the case was called. Plaintiffs counsel appeared late. Judge Massullo stated the ruling stands.***

Off Calendar Mar-28-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT TYLER HUGHES' Motion To Compel And Request For Sanctions Of Attorneys Fees And Costs For Failure Torespond To Discovery And Failure To Attend Deposition:

DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL AND REQUESTS FOR SANCTIONS IS UNOPPOSED. ACCORDINGLY, THE COURT WILL GRANT THE MOTION.

The court will review proposed order submitted by prevailing party.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Off Calendar Sep-29-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT TYLER HUGHES' MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND.

Defendant Tyler Hughes' motion to vacate default is granted. No opposition filed, and good cause shown. Defendant shall pay Plaintiff $1,000 in reasonable compensatory legal fees and costs (See Code Civ. Proc. Sec. 473(b).)

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/EPS)
